title: Compatibility
profTagline: Real astrological compatibility between two people — computed on your device from the true positions of the Sun, Moon, Venus and Mars on your birth dates (a real ephemeris), then scored as a synastry across five axes. No made-up numbers, fully offline.
installDesc: Works offline, opens like an app
installIosHint: In Safari: tap Share, then Add to Home Screen.
installGenericHint: In the browser menu choose Install or Add to Home Screen.
